summary_one_line: Input must carry the literal 'GDEF' table tag and a valid version so the version switch falls through past the default Null arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The input must contain a sanitizable OpenType font carrying a GDEF table whose 4-byte tag is the ASCII literal 'GDEF' (0x47 0x44 0x45 0x46) at the relevant table-directory offset, plus a version major of 1 or 2 so OT::GDEF::get_var_store()'s switch hits case 1 or case 2 rather than the default arm at line 794.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All winner-resolving seeds carry the exact bytes 47 44 45 46 ('GDEF') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f and a 00 01 version major at offset 0x00-0x01, so get_var_store() takes case 1/case 2 and the GDEF sanitize chain (CaretValue, GDEFVersion1_2, etc.) is exercised.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds have no concentrated 'GDEF' literal at 0x0c-0x0f (bytes are scattered: 00, 01, 20, 2c, ...), so no valid GDEF table is parsed; get_var_store() falls to the default arm and the GDEF sanitize functions show zero L hits.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the 4-byte memcmp/integer comparison of the table tag against 'GDEF' and I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant 'GDEF' operand directly into the input at the matching offset; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must stumble on the exact 4-byte literal by chance, which they never do.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the default arm of a version switch in get_var_store(); the winning side takes case 1 or case 2.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the literal 'GDEF' tag at offset 0x0c-0x0f.
The 'GDEF' literal is fully concentrated in the winner set and absent/scattered in the loser set at offsets 0x0c-0x0f.
Loser-blocking seeds take the true (default) branch and do not exercise the GDEF sanitize chain.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile (the loser of pair 2) has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
Both decisive pairs differ by the I2S technique and the winner resolves in 10/10 trials.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5232 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 13b375b9eff5c760` and observed two I2S-floor rows (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 10 and depth 11 of the ancestor chain, the lower-bound dash signal exclusive to cmplog/vpc in the canonical 4-fuzzer set.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only on the 4-byte 'GDEF' tag in which cmplog and naive resolve the branch at statistically indistinguishable rates (no cmplog>naive separation), showing the I2S substitution of the tag is not what drives the divergence.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff shows the 'GDEF' literal concentrated at a fixed offset 0x0c, but real fonts place the table tag at a directory-record offset that depends on table count, so the exact-offset framing may oversimplify how I2S lands the tag.
